ingredients.name: Nagashima Spa Land
ingredients.localName: ナガシマスパーランド
ingredients.entityContext: The amusement park where Shoya Ishida and his friends spend a summer day, establishing the carefree childhood atmosphere before his social fall. The roller coasters and festive crowds appear in the film's flashback sequences tying Shoya to his past self.

ingredients.name: Shino Bridge
ingredients.entityContext: A bridge near Ogaki that Shoya crosses during his solitary wanderings in the city, reflecting his isolation and the quiet Gifu townscape that defines the film's mood.

ingredients.name: Cheesecake Princess
ingredients.localName: チーズケーキプリンセス
ingredients.entityContext: A sweet shop in Ogaki that fans identify as inspiration for the bakery-adjacent street scenes Shoya passes through on his daily routes in the film.

ingredients.name: Ogaki Park
ingredients.entityContext: The central park in Ogaki where Shoya and Shoko meet and spend time together during their tentative reconnection, with the park's koi pond and paths appearing in key quiet moments between them.

ingredients.name: Ogaki Park Fountain
ingredients.entityContext: The fountain inside Ogaki Park appears in the background during Shoya and Shoko's walks together, framing their fragile, wordless moments of closeness.

ingredients.name: Ogaki Machinery Co., Ltd. Ogaki Main Branch
ingredients.localName: 大垣機工（株） 大垣本店

ingredients.name: Police Box at the Gifu Naka Police Station, Station Front
ingredients.localName: 岐阜中警察署 駅前交番

ingredients.name: Shiki no Hiroba
ingredients.entityContext: A small plaza near Ogaki's shopping street that appears in the film as Shoya and Shoko wander the town, capturing the ordinary, unhurried feel of their hometown.

ingredients.name: Former Ibikawa Bridge
ingredients.localName: 国指定重要文化財 旧揖斐川橋梁
ingredients.entityContext: The old railway bridge over the Ibi River is shown in the film's establishing shots of Ogaki, and fans recognize its iron lattice silhouette from pilgrimage scene comparisons.

ingredients.name: Ogakishi Sogofukushi Hall
ingredients.type: コミュニティ センター
categories: コミュニティ センター

ingredients.name: Midori Bridge
ingredients.entityContext: This small bridge over the Suimon River canal in Ogaki is one of the most-visited pilgrimage spots, appearing in the scene where Shoya looks out over the water during his solitary evening walks.

ingredients.name: Gifu Station
ingredients.entityContext: Gifu Station appears when characters travel between Ogaki and the larger city, capturing the transitional journeys that punctuate Shoya's attempts to rebuild connections.

ingredients.name: Yoro Park
ingredients.address: 1298-2 Takabayashi, Yoro, Yoro District, Gifu 503-1267, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The sprawling park in Yoro, Gifu is visited by Shoya and his group on a day trip, and its wide open grounds and greenery appear in the film's lighter ensemble moments.

ingredients.name: Nobunaga Plaza of Dreams
ingredients.entityContext: The plaza in front of Gifu Station, featuring the Oda Nobunaga statue, appears in background shots when characters arrive or depart by train, grounding the film firmly in the Gifu region.

ingredients.name: Ogaki City Tsurumi Crematorium
ingredients.entityContext: The crematorium in Ogaki appears in the deeply emotional scene involving the funeral of a character close to the group, marking one of the film's heaviest moments of grief and regret.

ingredients.name: OSOZAi+Bar Mino Misho Asty Ogaki
ingredients.localName: OSOZAi+バル美濃味匠 アスティ大垣店

ingredients.name: CLASSIC BAGEL
ingredients.address: 〒503-0908 Gifu, Ogaki, Nishitogawacho, 2 Chome−26 CLASSIC BAGEL

ingredients.name: Yoro Station
ingredients.address: Washinosu, Yoro, Yoro District, Gifu 503-1261, Japan

ingredients.name: Seifuro
ingredients.address: 190 Yamashitacho, Naka Ward, Yokohama, Kanagawa 231-0023, Japan

ingredients.name: Ogaki Station
ingredients.entityContext: Ogaki Station is the main transit hub the characters use throughout the film, and its platform and entrance appear in multiple scenes including Shoya's early morning commutes and the group's reunions.

ingredients.name: Ohashi Pharmacy Kuruwamachi
ingredients.localName: おおはし薬局 郭町店

ingredients.name: Marunouchi Park
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒503-0888 Gifu, Ogaki, Marunouchi, 2 Chome, 地内
ingredients.entityContext: A small park in the heart of Ogaki's castle district, visible in background shots as Shoya cycles through town, reinforcing the film's detailed recreation of Ogaki's everyday streetscape.

ingredients.name: Bairin Tei
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒503-1254 Gifu, Yoro District, Yoro, Yorokoen, 1274-1

ingredients.name: The Site of Reversible Destiny Yoro Park
ingredients.type: アート ギャラリー
categories: アート ギャラリー
ingredients.address: 1298ｰ2 Takabayashi, Yoro, Yoro District, Gifu 503-1267, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The surreal art installation at Yoro Park appears during the group's outing, its tilted, colorful landscape adding a dreamlike quality that mirrors the film's themes of altered perception and emotional disorientation.

ingredients.name: Yoro Falls
ingredients.address: 1298-2 Takabayashi, Yoro, Yoro District, Gifu 503-1267, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The famous waterfall in Yoro, Gifu is visited by Shoya and the group on their day trip outing, its rushing water and lush gorge serving as a backdrop for the group's fragile friendship.
